name: topic-visualizer
description: Marketplace hosting the Topic Visualizer: a home for might-not-do - the seam where a human mind and an AI mind keep the conversations they haven't had yet.

plugins.name: topic-visualizer
plugins.description: AI sessions silently plant unpursued topics into a local SQLite tree; three switchable views (Constellation, Lineage, Star Chart) with a shared state language - seedlings, frontier sparkles, rare critical beacons, discussed embers, prune-with-consequence. One card served per day, semantic search, and explicit conversion into work items or recorded decisions, so a maybe never silently becomes a commitment.
